name: billing_dashboard
description: Billing Dashboard — full-page financial analytics application for practice managers and billing staff. Shows financial overview, payer analysis, and reimbursement trends with CMS benchmark comparisons.

protocols.description: SimpleAPI serving the billing dashboard HTML, CSS, JS, and JSON metrics endpoints (staff-only)

applications.name: Billing Dashboard
applications.description: Full-page financial analytics dashboard showing revenue metrics, payer performance, and reimbursement trends
